title: Booja - Booja, Fine de Champagne Heart-shaped Hand Painted Box | Chocolate Truffle Hearts, 115g
features: 12 Delicious Heart-Shaped Fine de Champagne Chocolate Truffles: Luxuriously smooth and melt-in-the-mouth, infused with organic Fine de Champagne for a truly decadent experience.

Exquisite Hand-Painted Gift Box: Presented in a beautiful, reusable box, meticulously hand-painted by skilled Kashmiri artists using traditional techniques. A perfect gift for lovers of fine chocolate and artisan craftsmanship.
Certified Organic & Free-From friendly: Free from dairy, gluten, and soya. Made with minimal, high-quality ingredients. Perfect for those who seek exquisite chocolate without compromise.
Vegan & Palm Oil-Free: Elegantly simple and consciously crafted to be enjoyed by all. Suitable for vegans, vegetarians, and coeliacs. No palm oil or artificial additives.
Made in Norfolk, England: Craft and packed with care at our Booja-Booja HQ to ensure exceptional quality and flavour in every pack.
description: Product Description Discover the joys of vegan chocolate Delicious multi award-winning* chocolate truffles and truffle loglets: handmade with the finest organic ingredients to create moments of melt-in-the-mouth delight. *We're certified by The Vegan Society 2023 and The Soil Association 2023. So far this year we've won 5 awards for our chocolate truffles, from The Great Taste Awards 2023, Free From Food Awards 2023 and Nourish Vegan Awards 2023. In total, we've won 174 awards (and counting) across our product range. A little more about us... Booja - Booja offers you delicious moments of beautifully sweet pleasure that help brighten the faces of friends and loved ones... and to occasionally quietly enjoy on your own. Using the minimal number of simple organic ingredients, we've been making delightful chocolate truffles in Norfolk since 1999. With many awards* for taste and quality, it's easy to see why we have quickly developed an enthusiastic following. All of our delicious products are dairy, gluten and soya free. They're also palm oil-free. Suitable for vegans, vegetarians and coeliacs. Heart Shaped Gift Boxes 115g Scrumptious truffles featured in this collection... *NEW* Chocolate Salted Caramel Hearts Seas of salted chocolate caramel chewiness, heart shaped and coated in cocoa powder. *NEW* Fine de Champagne Hearts Charmingly befuddled with organic Fine de Champagne, heart shaped and coated in cocoa powder.
